summary: Well-designed test suite combining unit tests (pytest) and integration tests (act). Strong coverage of core functionality: all three secret states (expired/warning/ok), report generation, output formats (markdown/JSON), configuration loading with error scenarios, and CLI interface. Integration tests validate workflow structure, actionlint compliance, and exact output values across 3 test cases. Edge cases tested: boundary dates, empty groups, invalid input. Good error handling coverage with meaningful assertions. Tests are well-organized, clearly named, and properly documented. Minor gaps: limited parametrization in unit tests, missing some edge cases (very large secret counts, unusual characters), and fixture files referenced but not shown in provided code (though test harness verifies them). Acts as reliable regression detector through dual-level approach (unit + workflow integration).
